creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Created attachment 206631
bash-completion-2.9,1.log

Still ongoing for quite some time, but I'm completely stumped here. gmake keeps hitting an error 1 but there's no actual error visible.

===>   Generating temporary packing list
gmake[1]: Entering directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/shells/bash-completion/work/bash-completion-2.9'
Making install in completions
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:479: install-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/shells/bash-completion/work/bash-completion-2.9'

This has consistent reproduction in multiple poudriere installs, 11 and 12, always aarch64.
